name: EXTRASKELETAL FIBROSARCOMA
definition: malignant tumor of fibroblasts of classic herringbone-like architecture

demographics.Prevalence: 1-3% of sarcomas in adults; 11-12% of sarcomas in infants

dominant_finding: heterogeneous high signal intensity on T2WI
discriminating_features: heterogeneous mass of predominantly low signal intensity with variable enhancement on
heterogeneous high signal intensity on T2WI

MR: heterogeneous mass of predominantly low signal intensity with variable enhancement on
heterogeneous high signal intensity on T2WI

clinical.Prognosis: infantile extraskeletal fibrosarcoma better than adult fibrosarcoma
